recipe.title: Quick veggie curry
recipe.description: Sweet potato, chickpeas and greens are the best of mates and work together in beautiful harmony in this speedy veg curry.

ingredients.name: spring greens
ingredients.note: or other spring veg, such as Swiss chard, cabbage, spinach

steps.descr: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a large wide...
steps.instructions: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a large wide shallow pan on a high heat. Add the onion and sweet potato and cook for 5 minutes, then stir in the curry paste and cook for 10 minutes, or until golden, scraping up any sticky bits from the base of the pan.

on_enter.say: Drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil into a large wide shallow pan on a high heat. Add the onion and sweet potato and cook for 5 minutes, then stir in the curry paste and cook for 10 minutes, or until golden, scraping up any sticky bits from the base of the pan.

steps.descr: Add the chickpeas, juice and all, and mash a few with a fork
steps.instructions: Add the chickpeas, juice and all, and mash a few with a fork. Scrunch in the tomatoes and add 1 tin’s worth of water. Bring to the boil, then turn the heat down and simmer for 15 minutes, or until thickened.

on_enter.say: Add the chickpeas, juice and all, and mash a few with a fork. Scrunch in the tomatoes and add 1 tin’s worth of water. Bring to the boil, then turn the heat down and simmer for 15 minutes, or until thickened.

steps.descr: Push the curry to one side of the pan
steps.instructions: Push the curry to one side of the pan. Slice and add the sliced spring greens, then cover and simmer for 5 minutes, or until wilted (if cooking different greens, simply adjusting the cooking time accordingly).

on_enter.say: Push the curry to one side of the pan. Slice and add the sliced spring greens, then cover and simmer for 5 minutes, or until wilted (if cooking different greens, simply adjusting the cooking time accordingly).

steps.descr: Stir half the greens through the curry, then divide the...
steps.instructions: Stir half the greens through the curry, then divide the curry and greens between warm plates and serve with rice or warm naans, a dollop of yoghurt and mango chutney, if you like.

on_enter.say: Stir half the greens through the curry, then divide the curry and greens between warm plates and serve with rice or warm naans, a dollop of yoghurt and mango chutney, if you like.
